label: Transparent ginger rhizome motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Ginger Rhizome transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a ginger rhizome botanical cutout for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: One complete fresh ginger rhizome cluster with branching knuckles and natural fibrous warm tan skin, subtle cut-ring texture, fine root hairs, a few upright young shoot tips in fresh green with pink blush at the bases, tropical farm produce realism. Crisp botanical edges, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any rhizome or shoot.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves warm tan, cream, blush pink, and shoot green material detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no soil, no basket, no hand, no farm landscape, no second plant, no decorative background.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Ginger Rhizome light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named "Morphous Ginger Rhizome", derived from the visible ginger rhizome cutout with warm tan root skin, cream cut rings, shoot green leaves, and pink blush shoot bases.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, polished product-system presentation, precise grid, 8px radius throughout.
Required visible sections with clear large labels: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Use only motif-derived colors: warm tan ginger skin, pale cream cut-ring highlights, harvest brown creases, deep root brown, shoot green, olive leaf shadow, pink blush, soft tropical-farm near-neutrals. No unrelated bright colors.
Design mood: energetic commerce system for tropical farm inventory, order flow, analytics, and marketplace operations; crisp shadcn/tweakcn controls.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command palette, sidebar navigation, top nav, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius token, border token, shadow token, color token swatches, and small motif asset example.
Typography: modern English product UI plus Japanese examples for Gothic body text and Mincho editorial accent; short readable labels only.
Constraints: no generic orange UI, no purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, do not misspell "Morphous Ginger Rhizome".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Ginger Rhizome dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board for "Morphous Ginger Rhizome" that feels like the same light board translated to dark mode, derived from the visible ginger rhizome motif and light-mode board.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, polished professional design-system presentation, precise grid, 8px radius throughout.
Required visible sections with clear large labels: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve only motif-derived colors: deep root brown and charcoal ginger shadow for backgrounds, cream cut-ring text, warm tan ginger skin surfaces, harvest brown controls, shoot green accents, olive shadow, and pink blush signal states. No unrelated bright colors.
Design mood: energetic commerce system for tropical farm inventory, order flow, analytics, and marketplace operations; dark operational dashboard with warm botanical highlights.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command palette, sidebar navigation, top nav, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius token, border token, shadow token, color token swatches, and small motif asset example.
Typography: modern English product UI plus Japanese examples for Gothic body text and Mincho editorial accent; short readable labels only.
Constraints: no generic black UI, no neon colors, no purple or blue gradients, no unrelated colors, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, do not misspell "Morphous Ginger Rhizome".
